title: tarenna zippeliana
intro: Tarenna zippeliana, also known as the Zippeliana or Zippel's tarenna, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka and India. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Tarenna zippeliana, such as infusions and extracts, have been used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and may also have potential benefits for cardiovascular health and immune system support.
